_TracebackStyle
nodeid
returnc
Return the parent node IDs of a given node ID, inclusive.
    For the node ID
        "testing/code/test_excinfo.py::TestFormattedExcinfo::test_repr_source"
    the result would be
        ""
        "testing"
        "testing/code"
        "testing/code/test_excinfo.py"
        "testing/code/test_excinfo.py::TestFormattedExcinfo"
        "testing/code/test_excinfo.py::TestFormattedExcinfo::test_repr_source"
    Note that :: parts are only considered at the last / component.
    r
::N)
find
len)
sepZ

NodeMetac
Direct construction of {name} has been deprecated, please use {name}.from_parent.
See https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/deprecations.html#node-construction-changed-to-node-from-parent for more details.

)Fr-
Base class for Collector and Item, the components of the test
    collection tree.
    Collector subclasses have children; Items are leaf nodes.
    )

keywords

extra_keyword_matchesrF
__init__u
Node.__init__)
Public constructor for Nodes.
        This indirection got introduced in order to enable removing
        the fragile logic from the node constructors.
        Subclasses can use ``super().from_parent(...)`` when overriding the
        construction.
        :param parent: The parent node of this Node.
        rC
z.config is not a valid argument for from_parentrD
z/session is not a valid argument for from_parentrB
clsrB
from_parent
Node.from_parentc
z6fspath-sensitive hook proxy used to call pytest hooks.)
gethookproxyrE
ihook
Node.ihook
<{} {}>r1
__repr__
Node.__repr__)
warningr 
Issue a warning for this Node.
        Warnings will be displayed after the test session, unless explicitly suppressed.
        :param Warning warning:
            The warning instance to issue.
        :raises ValueError: If ``warning`` instance is not a subclass of Warning.
        Example usage:
        .. code-block:: python
            node.warn(PytestWarning("some message"))
            node.warn(UserWarning("some message"))
        .. versionchanged:: 6.2
            Any subclass of :class:`Warning` is now accepted, rather than only
            :class:`PytestWarning <pytest.PytestWarning>` subclasses.
        z<warning must be an instance of Warning or subclass, got {!r}N

defaultr 
Return the first marker matching the name, from closest (for
        example function) to farther level (for example module level).
        :param default: Fallback return value if no marker was found.
        :param name: Name to filter by.

finr 
Register a function to be called when this node is finalized.
        This method can only be called when this node is active
        in a setup chain, for example during self.setup().

BaseExceptionr
	metaclass)
Try to extract the actual location from a node, depending on available attributes:
    * "location": a pair (path, lineno)
    * "obj": a Python object that the node wraps.
    * "fspath": just a path
    :rtype: A tuple of (str|py.path.local, int) with filename and line number.
    
locationN
objrE
unknown locationr"
	Collectorz\Collector instances create children through collect() and thus
    iteratively build a tree.c

FilezOBase class for collecting tests from a file.

    Nr
zvA basic test invocation item.
    Note that for a single function there might be multiple test invocation items.
    Nr
_report_sectionsZ
user_properties)
Item.__init__rU
Nz,runtest must be implemented by Item subclassr
runtest2
Item.runtest)
when
contentr 
Add a new report section, similar to what's done internally to add
        stdout and stderr captured output::
            item.add_report_section("call", "stdout", "report section contents")
        :param str when:
            One of the possible capture states, ``"setup"``, ``"call"``, ``"teardown"``.
        :param str key:
            Name of the section, can be customized at will. Pytest uses ``"stdout"`` and
            ``"stderr"`` internally.
        :param str content:
            The full contents as a string.
        N)
add_report_section5
Item.add_report_sectionc
reportinfoF
Item.reportinfoc
